positive: A stylized, highly detailed illustration of a mystical celestial forest at twilight. The scene features large, stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna, such as glowing mushroom clusters and graceful, ethereal glowing moth silhouettes. The composition is centered and symmetrical, designed for clean print-on-fabric application. Use a deep indigo and vibrant turquoise color palette, accented by pops of neon magenta and electric yellow for the glow. Style must be a blend of neo-tribal engraving and intricate psychedelic art, utilizing strong negative space and clean silhouettes for contrast. Cinematic backlighting emanating from the glowing elements, giving a perfect depth and magical quality. Vector illustration quality, graphic novel feel, symmetrical.
negative: blurry, low detail, amateur, grain, noise, watermark, text, signature, logo, ugly, messy, cartoon, photographic, realistic, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, artifacts
